sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18364" key="a)filoplouti/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῐλο-πλουτία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18364.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contempt for wealth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg034:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Comp.Lys.Sull.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
